steps.title: Modify the noun phrase
steps.content: The blank follows films by Indigenous women and should describe those films as having been featured in film festivals. A perfect infinitive can modify the noun phrase while expressing a completed action.

steps.title: Reject extra finite verbs
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D are finite verb phrases. In this position, they incorrectly create another predicate instead of modifying films. The perfect infinitive form fits the sentence. The answer is A.
